description.text: You stand before the entrance to an ancient crypt.
A heavy iron door blocks the way north.

north.result_text: You light your torch and approach the iron door. It seems to have a keyhole.

description.text: A dark room. You hear water dripping.
A faint draft comes from under a doorway to the north.
The iron door behind you is now unlocked.

take.result_text: You pick up a rusty key.

use.result_text: The key fits! The door unlocks with a click.

north.result_text: You push open the iron door and enter the next chamber.

description.text: Gold coins spill across the floor!
You have found the treasure of the ancient crypt!
